article_sharing_description: Show social media sharing on article
article_img_formatting_description: Standardizes the appearance and size of the image container
articles_in_section_description: Show sidebar of articles in section
article_text_formatting_description: Standardizes the appearance of all texts
background_color_description: Background color of your Help Center
brand_color_description: Brand color for major navigational elements
brand_text_color_description: Brand color for hover and active states
banner_home_desktop_description: Escolha uma imagem para o banner.
banner_home_mobile_description: Escolha uma imagem para o banner que será exibida em dispositivos móveis.
categories_custom_content_description: Displays informative content in the categories section
community_background_image_description: Hero image on the community topics page
community_image_description: Image for the community section on the home page
favicon_description: Icon displayed in the address bar of your browser
follow_article_description: Users can follow a specific article
follow_post_description: Users can follow a specific post
follow_section_description: Users can follow a specific section
follow_topic_description: Users can follow a specific topic
header_alert_banner_description: Displays a banner at the top of the page. If other banners are active, the content will automatically rotate.
header_new_ticket_description: Displays the button in the header.
homepage_bg_enable_description: Displays the background image at the top, behind the search field
homepage_background_image_description: Hero image on the home page
hover_link_color_description: Text color for the hover state of link elements
post_sharing_description: Show social media sharing on post
recent_activity_description: Show recent activity on home page
redirection_gw_ribbon_description: Displays a banner at the top of the page. If other banners are active, the content will automatically rotate.
request_list_beta_description: Users can sort and filter requests, add and remove columns
scoped_community_search_description: Search results are confined to the topic the user is in
scoped_knowledge_base_search_description: Search results are confined to the category the user is in
search_form_animated_description: Predefined effect on the search field border
section_categories_appearance_descriptio: Changes the appearance of the categories
section_categories_show_icon_description: Displays an icon above the titles.
section_categories_color_hover_descripti: The card color changes when hovering the mouse
section_categories_max_width_description: Sets the maximum width of the section displaying the categories.
show_brand_name_description: Display the Help Center name next to the logo
show_comment_form_description: Displays the message form by default, without requiring a button click
show_community_description: When selected, access to the community will be displayed.
show_explore_categories_description: Displays an option to explore all categories
show_home_banner_description: Exibe um banner na página inicial.
text_color_description: Text color for body and heading elements
visited_link_color_description: Text color for visited link elements
whatsapp_ticket_link_description: Displays a button to redirect the support request
